Description: A huge, blue, fast object in the sky. There was a cloud of smoke and it made the floor shake.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych glas cyflym enfawr yn yr awyr. Roedd cwmwl o fwg ac fe wnaeth i'r llawr grynu.

Description: A 'tube of light' coming down from the sky. It first looked like a star moving towards the car. Left a dust cover on the car.
Disgrifiad: Tiwb o oleuni' yn dod i lawr o'r awyr. Edrychodd yn gyntaf fel seren yn symud tuag at y car. Gadawodd haen o lwch ar y car.

Description: Three white lights accompanied by a red light. They seemed to be many miles away.
Disgrifiad: Tri golau gwyn ynghyd â golau coch. Roedden nhw fel petaen nhw'n filltiroedd lawer i ffwrdd.

Description: Cigar shaped object, with wings but no tail. Jade green in colour. White lights through windows. Moved in a straight line.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych siâp sigar, gydag adenydd ond dim cynffon. Gwyrdd jâd ei liw. Goleuadau gwyn drwy ffenestri. Symudodd mewn llinell syth.

Description: One oblong object. It was red in the centre and had up to fifteen lights. There was constant movement.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych petryal. Roedd yn goch yn y canol ac roedd ganddo hyd at bymtheg o oleuadau. Roedd symudiad parhaus.

Description: One, triangular shaped object. A shiny, golden colour. It was moving in a straight line and was fast.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych, siâp triongl. Lliw disglair, euraid. Roedd yn symud mewn llinell syth ac roedd yn gyflym.

Description: There was a cream coloured light.
Disgrifiad: Roedd goleuni lliw hufan.

Description: A round ball with a tail. Was like a torch with a flare. There was no movement.
Disgrifiad: Pêl gron gyda chynffon. Roedd fel tortsh gyda fflêr. Doedd dim symudiad.

Description: One object with white and red lights.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych gyda goleuadau gwyn a choch.

Description: One, large, oval, white and very bright object. The object was straight and level and was moving parallel with the car.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych mawr, hirgrwn, gwyn a  llachar iawn. Roedd y gwrthrych yn syth ac yn wastad ac roedd yn symud yn gyfochrog â'r car.

Description: An object was moving in 90 degree angles. It sped up and then slowed down.
Disgrifiad: Roedd gwrthrych yn symud mewn onglau 90 gradd. Cyflymodd ac yna arafodd.

Description: There were two identically sized crafts. Extremely bright and both an obscured shape. They oscillated in an eliptical pattern.
Disgrifiad: Roedd dwy long o'r un maint yn union. Hynod o lachar a'r ddwy yn siâp aneglur. Roeddent yn pendilio mewn patrwm hirgylchog.

Description: One round object with lights. There was one medium constant light.There was an unusual noise. It made erratic jerky movements.
One large, triangular shaped object. Black in colour. Was moving to the West.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych mawr, siâp triongl. Du ei liw. Roedd yn symud tua'r Gorllewin.

Description: One round object. Yellow in colour, bright and shimmering. It was moving from left to right.
One object, with one light on the front. About 450 ft up. It moved West and picked up speed.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych, gydag un golau ar y blaen. Tua 450 troedfedd i fyny. Symudodd tua'r Gorllewin a chyflymodd.

Description: A round, black object was travelling across the sky at speed. There appeared to be something draping from the bottom.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych du, crwn a oedd yn teithio ar draws yr awyr ar garlam. Roedd yn ymddangos bod rhywbeth yn llieinio o'r gwaelod.

Description: One large, house sized, rugby ball shaped object. Was grey and black in colour. There were lights on it, in a triangle shape.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych mawr, maint tŷ, siâp pêl rygbi. Roedd ei liw yn llwyd a du.  Roedd goleuadau arno, ar ffurf triongl.

Description: A triangular object. Had multicoloured flashing lights. It hovered and then shot off in an Easterly direction at high speed.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych trionglog. Roedd ganddo oleuadau amryliw yn fflachio. Hofrannodd ac yna gwibio i ffwrdd i gyfeiriad y Dwyrain yn gyflym iawn.

Description: A large, round object, as big as a house. It had a cluster of lights within it. It was pulsating left and right, as if on a pivot.
One object, with four lights. All yellow/orange in colour. It moved to the North, then turned to it's original position, then disappeared.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych, gyda phedwar golau. Melyn/oren i gyd o ran lliw. Symudodd i'r gogledd, yna trodd i'w safle gwreiddiol, yna diflannu.

Description: Oefnfeec ot.b  ject, that was bigger than a car. It was white and very bright. It came down the road.
Disgrifiad: Oefnfeec gwrt.h  rych, a oedd yn fwy o faint na char. Roedd yn wyn ac yn llachar iawn. Daeth i lawr yr heol.

Description: One shooting star. It zig-zagged across the sky, and then it disappeared.
Disgrifiad: Un seren wib. Symudodd yn igam-ogam ar draws yr awyr, ac yna diflannodd.

Description: A small triangular shaped object. It had black wings, and was sausage shaped in the middle. It was moving very fast.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych bach siâp triongl. Roedd ganddo adenydd du, ac roedd ei siâp fel selsigen yn y canol. Roedd yn symud yn gyflym iawn.

Description: One round object, with a white light. It also had flashing/rotating blue and red lights. It moved up and down.
Three round, star sized objects, in a triangular formation. They circled around each other, and then went back to their original position. White and very bright. They were
Disgrifiad: Tri gwrthrych crwn, maint seren, mewn ffurfwedd triongl. Symudan nhw o gwmpas ei gilydd, ac yna mynd yn ôl i'w safle gwreiddiol. Gwyn a llachar iawn. Roedden nhw'n

Description: One round shaped object. Red, orange and green in colour and bright. The object was stationary.
One object that had four lights on it. The lights were green, white, red and blue. The object was spinning in the sky.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych â phedwar golau arno. Roedd y goleuadau'n wyrdd, gwyn, coch a glas. Roedd y gwrthrych yn troelli yn yr awyr.

Description: One large, circular object. White and very bright. The object was moving backwards and forwards.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych mawr crwn. Gwyn a llachar iawn. Roedd y gwrthrych yn symud yn ôl ac ymlaen.

Description: A bright, circular red light. About 3mm in diameter, relative to cockpit windscreen. Was moving in a Westerly direction.
Disgrifiad: Goleuni coch llachar, crwn. Tua 3mm mewn diamedr, o'i gymharu â sgrin wynt caban peilot. Roedd yn symud i gyfeiriad y Gorllewin.

Description: Circular in shape with a tail and extremely bright. It moved incredibly fast in different directions across the sky.
Disgrifiad: Crwn ei siâp gyda chynffon ac yn hynod o lachar. Symudodd yn anghredadwy o gyflym mewn cyfeiriadau gwahanol ar draws yr awyr.

Description: Black, triangular shaped object, with two fins.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych du, siâp triongl, gyda dwy asgell.

Description: One object, thought to be a star, with stud like lights underneath in a circle. Was travelling North in a straight line.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych, y credwyd ei fod yn seren, gyda goleuadau tebyg i stydiau odano mewn cylch. Roedd yn teithio tua'r gogledd mewn llinell syth.

Description: Blast of orange light. In the same direction, three golden balls appeared, that were brighter and then they disappeared.
Disgrifiad: Ffrwydrad o oleuni oren. Yn yr un cyfeiriad, ymddangosodd tair pêl euraid, a oedd yn fwy llachar ac yna diflannon nhw.

Description: A large, black, oblong shaped object, approx. 30-40ft long. It was about 15-25ft off the ground.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych mawr, du, hirgrwn, tua 30-40 troedfedd o hyd.  Roedd tu 15-25 troedfedd uwchben y ddaear.

Description: One large, square-ish, very bright object. Was blue-ish with lights around it. There was a humming sound and a nasty smell.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych mawr, sgwaraidd, llachar iawn. Roedd yn lasaidd gyda goleuadau o'i gwmpas. Roedd sŵn grwnan ac arogl ffiaidd.

Description: An object, had blue lights on the top and white lights on the bottom. Was 40ft in length. About 600ft high.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych, â goleuadau glas ar ei frig a goleuadau gwyn ar y gwaelod. Roedd yn 40 troedfedd o hyd. Tua 600 troedfedd o uchder.

Description: A huge meccano/round type looking structure/object, with pulsing red, green and white lights. Very slow moving.
Disgrifiad: Un strwythur/gwrthrych enfawr â golwg tebyg i meccano/crwn, gyda goleuadau coch, gwyrdd a gwyn a oedd yn pwlsadu. Yn symud yn araf iawn.

Description: One long shaped object, with six flashing lights. They were flashing from faded to very bright. They were moving from North to South.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych siâp hir, a chwech o oleuadau a oedd yn fflachio. Roedden nhw'n fflachio o ddi-liw i lachar iawn. Roedden nhw'n symud o'r Gogledd tua'r De.

Description: One light, golden in appearance, larger and brighter than a planet. Was travelling from South West to the East.
Disgrifiad: Un goleuni, euraid o ran golwg, yn fwy o faint a mwy llachar na phlaned. Roedd yn teithio o'r De-orllewin tua'r Dwyrain.

Description: No distinctive shape, but was extremely bright red. Had white and blue flashing lights. It was extremely noisy. Shot off at great speed.
Disgrifiad: Dim siâp arbennig, ond roedd yn goch llachar iawn. Roedd ganddo oleuadau gwyn a glas yn fflachio. Roedd yn hynod o swnllyd. Symudodd i ffwrdd ar gyflymder anhygoel.

Description: One white ball of light, the size of a 5p piece at arms length. Plus, there were two smaller, faint objects in trail too.
Disgrifiad: Un bêl wen o oleuni, maint darn 5c ar hyd braich. Hefyd, roedd dau wrthrych gwelw, llai o faint yn ei dilyn.

Description: One glowing outer ring, surrounding an oval structure with pulsating lights.
Disgrifiad: Un fodrwy allanol dywynnol, yn amgylchynu strwythur hirgrwn â goleuadau a oedd yn pwlsadu.

Description: Vortex with white, red and green flashing lights. Rose straight up vertically from behind woods in the form of an arc. Smokey trail.
Disgrifiad: Trobwll â goleuadau gwyn, coch a gwyrdd yn fflachio. Cododd yn syth yn fertigol o'r tu ôl i goed ar ffurf arch. Trywydd myglyd ar ei ôl.

Description: Four main lights formed a cross. There were bright green and orange lights in the centre. Was larger than a 747.
Disgrifiad: Pedwar prif olau yn ffurfio croes. Roedd goleuadau gwyrdd ac oren llachar yn y canol. Roedd yn fwy o faint na 747.

Description: One huge, silver, star shaped object.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych enfawr, arian siâp seren.

Description: A star size, bright object. Was blue/white in colour.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych llachar maint seren. Roedd yn las/gwyn o ran lliw.

Description: A very bright, white light in the sky, moving fast.
Disgrifiad: Golau gwyn, llachar iawn yn yr awyr, yn symud yn gyflym.

Description: Spheres - colours on and off in sequences.
Disgrifiad: Sfferau - lliwiau ymlaen ac i ffwrdd mewn dilyniannau.

Description: One huge 'aura' was seen, was tapered to one end, like a pen. Was multicoloured and shimmering.
Disgrifiad: Gwelwyd un 'awra' anferth, yn frigfain tuag un pen, fel ysgrifbin. Roedd yn amryliw ac yn grychdonnog.

Description: One beam of blue light that was very bright. It then turned white and then disappeared leaving a vapour trail.
Disgrifiad: Un belydren o oleuni glas a oedd yn llachar iawn.  Yna trodd yn wyn a diflannodd gan adael ôl anwedd.

Description: One bright, white light in the shape of a circle, with a vapour trail.
Disgrifiad: Un goleuni gwyn, llachar ar siâp cylch, gydag ôl anwedd.

Description: There were several blue-ish, white-ish lights.
Disgrifiad: Roedd sawl golau glasaidd, gwynnaidd.

Description: One large, dark hexagonal object with two white lights. Was humming and flew low over the witnesses house.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych mawr, tywyll chweochrog gyda dau olau gwyn. Roedd yn grwnan a hedodd yn isel dros dŷ'r tyst.

Description: One very bright, white light. Very high altitude.
Disgrifiad: Un golau gwyn, llachar iawn. Uchder uchel iawn.

Description: One flat, triangular object, (like a shield), white in colour. Coloured lights mainly round the edge of the craft. Spotlight beneath.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych gwastad, trionglog, (fel tarian), gwyn ei liw. Goleuadau lliw yn bennaf o amgylch ymyl y llong. Sbotolau odano.

Description: One large oval, with a sphere in the middle. Had bright blue, green and white lights on top of the craft. There was a humming noise.
Disgrifiad: Un hirgrwn mawr, gyda sffêr yn y canol. Roedd ganddo oleuadau llachar glas, gwyrdd a gwyn ar ben y llong. Roedd sŵn grwnan.

Description: One object, a pinprick of light changing colour between red, green and orange.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych, pigiad o oleuni yn newid lliw rhwng coch, gwyrdd ac oren.

Description: Flying saucer shape, with three square like windows, like a house. Was light - got lighter, then dimmed. Slightly tilted.
Disgrifiad: Siâp soser hedegog, gyda thair ffenestr sgwâr, fel tŷ. Roedd yn olau - aeth yn oleuach, yna pylu. Tipyn bach ar ongl.

Description: Cross shaped collection of five star like objects. Gold coloured lights.
Disgrifiad: Casgliad siâp croes o bum gwrthrych tebyg i seren. Goleuadau lliw aur.

Description: A single blue and red object. Very bright. It made an S pattern in the sky, when finished, moved North East.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych glas a choch. Llachar iawn. Gwnaeth batrwm S yn yr awyr, ar ôl gorffen, symudodd i'r Gogledd-ddwyrain.

Description: Single aircraft/object, that had rotors. It had blue, red and white strobes.
Disgrifiad: Un awyren/gwrthrych sengl, yr oedd ganddo rotorau. Roedd ganddo strobau glas, coch a gwyn.

Description: Two dark grey objects. They then looked translucent. They were manoeuvring and then disappeared into the cloud.
Disgrifiad: Dau wrthrych llwyd tywyll. Yna roedden nhw'n edrych yn dryloyw. Roedden nhw'n cad-drefnu ac yna diflannon nhw i mewn i'r cwmwl.

Description: Flashing lights that were various colours. Shape unknown. Moving West.
Disgrifiad: Goleuadau o wahanol liwiau a oedd yn fflachio. Siâp anhysbys. Yn symud i'r Gorllewin.

Description: One, large, round white light. Very bright. Moving from West to East.
Disgrifiad: Un golau gwyn mawr, crwn. Llachar iawn. Yn symud o'r Gorllewin i'r Dwyrain.

Description: Cardiff - Set of one red, blue and yellow lights in a straight line. Very bright. Pontypridd - one set of bright white lights in a triangle.
Disgrifiad: Caerdydd - Set o un golau coch, un glas ac un melyn mewn llinell syth. Llachar iawn. Pontypridd - un set o oleuadau gwyn llachar mewn triongl.

Description: One capsule. Blue and silver at rear.
Disgrifiad: Un capsiwl. Glas ac arian yn y cefn.

Description: Circular shaped object. Too high to be a bird and too low to be a plane. Was travelling from East to West.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych siâp crwn. Rhy uchel i fod yn aderyn a rhy isel i fod yn awyren. Roedd yn teithio o'r Dwyrain i'r Gorllewin.

Description: One object, white and very bright. Very high up and very fast.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych, gwyn a llachar iawn. Yn uchel iawn ac yn gyflym iawn.

Description: One object, the size of a hot air balloon. Was bright, with a honeycomb of light. Was stationary and then flew off.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych, maint balŵn aer poeth. Roedd yn llachar, gyda chrwybr o oleuni. Roedd yn sefyll yn ei unfan ac yna hedodd i ffwrdd.

Description: One metallic sphere, approximately five-six metres. Was flying erratically from South to North along the Rhymney Valley.
Disgrifiad: Un sffer metalig, tua phum-chwe metr. Roedd yn hedfan yn wibiog o'r De i'r Gogledd ar hyd Cwm Rhymni.

Description: Disc/star shape object with coloured lights, blue and green, spinning around it. Sphere of light high in the atmosphere.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych siâp disg/seren gyda goleuadau lliw, glas a gwyrdd, yn troelli o'i gwmpas. Sffer o oleuni'n uchel yn yr atmosffer.

Description: One cylindrical object. White and very bright. Was moving from left to right.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych silindraidd. Gwyn a llachar iawn. Roedd yn symud o'r chwith i'r dde.

Description: Like a medium, bright star. Made an unusual gentle ark. Then some strange squiggles from left to right. High up in the sky.
Disgrifiad: Fel seren ganolig, lachar. Gwnaeth arch fwyn anghyffredin. Yna rhai llinellau igam ogam rhyfedd o'r chwith i'r dde. Yn uchel yn yr awyr.

Description: One star shaped object. Coloured lights around it - green, blue and red. Spinning.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych siâp seren. Goleuadau lliw o'r amgylch - gwyrdd, glas a choch. Yn troelli.

Description: A bright light.
Disgrifiad: Un golau llachar.

Description: One disc shaped object, bluey silver in colour. Moved in a straight line. Definitely not a star or planet.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych siâp disg, arian glasaidd ei liw. Symudodd mewn llinell syth. Yn bendant ddim yn seren nac yn blaned.

Description: Large, bright object.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych mawr, llachar.

Description: One object, larger than normal aircraft, tubular shape. Was bright green tinged with blue. Moved downwards leaving trail behind.
UFO with a light, was hovering. A second UFO appeared. Had a large bright, white light. Also seemed to have red and green fleck on it.
Disgrifiad: Roedd UFO gyda golau, yn hofran. Ymddangosodd ail UFO. Roedd ganddo olau mawr gwyn, llachar. Hefyd roedd yn edrych petai fritho coch a gwyrdd arno.

Description: A white, onion shaped object, which was glowing white, with sparks. Was moving rapidly in a straight line.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych gwyn, siâp winwn, a oedd yn disgleirio'n wyn, gyda gwreichion. Roedd yn symud yn gyflym mewn llinell syth.

Description: A vertical orange line near the horizon. Moved to a horizontal position. One inch at arms length.
Disgrifiad: Llinell oren fertigol ger y gorwel. Symudodd i safle llorweddol. Un fodfedd ar hyd braich.

Description: Giant dewdrop shaped object. Had a yellow centre and a green/blue haze around the outside. Too big to be a shooting star.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych enfawr siâp diferyn gwlith. Roedd canol melyn ganddo a niwl gwyrdd/glas o amgylch y tu allan. Rhy fawr i fod yn seren wib.

Description: A bright, Venus, pale orange object. Was moving as a bird would, in and out of formation.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych llachar, Fenws, oren gwelw. Roedd yn symud fel y byddai aderyn, i mewn ac allan o gyfluniad.

Description: One star shaped object. White and very bright. Very erratic movement.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych siâp seren. Yn wyn ac yn llachar iawn. Symud yn wibiedig iawn.

Description: Three objects/lights that were flickering on and off. They moved West and then moved to the South.
Disgrifiad: Tri gwrthrych/golau a oedd yn fflicrio ymlaen ac i ffwrdd. Symudon nhw i'r Gorllewin ac yna symud i'r De.

Description: Comet shaped and with about a one foot long flare, four to six times bigger than a star. Moving from East to North East.
Disgrifiad: Siâp comed ac roedd fflêr tua throedfedd o hyd, pedair neu chwe gwaith yn fwy o faint na seren. Yn symud o'r Dwyrain i'r Gogledd-ddwyrain.

Description: One star shaped object. Moving West.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych siâp seren. Yn symud tua'r Gorllewin.

Description: One large white ball. It hovered and then disappeared.
Disgrifiad: Un bêl fawr wen. Hofrannodd ac yna diflannodd.

Description: One object, like a malteser when held at arms length. Spherical and very bright. Orange, red, green and white colours on it. Pulsating.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych, fel malteser o'i ddal ar hyd braich. Yn sfferaidd ac yn llachar iawn. Lliwiau oren, coch, gwyrdd a gwyn arni. Yn pwlsadu.

Description: One circular, silvery white disc. Was right above the witness and then shot off.
Disgrifiad: Un disg crwn, gwyn arianlliw. Roedd yn union uwchben y tyst ac yna saethodd i ffwrdd.

Description: A large fireball/meteorite/piece of debris spotted over the mountains. It seemed to be flaming, rather than glowing.
Disgrifiad: Pêl fawr o dân/awyrfaen/darn o falurion a welwyd dros y mynyddoedd. Roedd fel peta'n fflamio, yn hytrach na thywynnu.

Description: Diamond shape, with three lights. One red and two white lights changing colour.
Disgrifiad: Siâp diemwnt, gyda thri golau. Un golau coch a dau olau gwyn yn newid lliw.

Description: Triangular, stacked as plates, with triangular shaped windows with lights.
Disgrifiad: Yn drionglog, wedi eu pentyrru fel platiau, gyda ffenestri siâp trionglog gyda goleuadau.

Description: Big explosion with an intense white light.
Disgrifiad: Ffrwydrad mawr gyda golau gwyn dwys.

Description: Red light. Hovered.
Disgrifiad: Golau coch. Hofrannodd.

Description: One large, round fireball. Very bright.
Disgrifiad: Un bêl fawr, gron o dân. Llachar iawn.

Description: Bright light in the sky.
Disgrifiad: Golau llachar yn yr awyr.

Description: One large, round light. Gold, then changed to red/amber. Changing from one side to the other.
Disgrifiad: Un golau mawr, crwn. Yn euraid, yna newidiodd i goch/ambr. Yn newid o un ochr i'r llall.

Description: Object, roundish shape, silvery white. Was quite low down and enormously bright.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych, siâp weddol crwn, gwyn arianlliw. Roedd yn eithaf isel ac yn syfrdanol o lachar.

Description: Like a shooting star, but with a burning tail. About the size of a military aircraft. It looked like it was heading towards the ground.
Disgrifiad: Fel seren wib, gyda chynffon tanllyd. Tua maint awyren milwrol. Edrychodd fel petai'n anelu tuag at y llawr.

Description: Object was a tri-angle shape, like an inverted ice cream cone. The object disappeared down a country lane.
Disgrifiad: Gwrthrych a oedd yn siâp triongl, fel côn hufan iâ wyneb i waered. Diflannodd y gwrthrych i lawr lôn cefn gwlad.

Description: It initially looked like a star. Looked like it was going to crash into the witness's house. Was a green colour, with red on the side.
Disgrifiad: Edrychodd fel seren i ddechrau. Edrychodd fel petai'n mynd i fwrw i mewn i dŷ'r tyst. Roedd ei liw yn wyrdd, gyda choch ar yr ochr.

Description: One object, with a blue glow, which then turned green. It broke up and left smoke. It seemed very large.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych, yn tywynnu'n las, a drodd yn wyrdd wedyn. Torrodd yn ddarnau a gadawodd fwg. Roedd yn fawr iawn yn ôl pob golwg.

Description: One bright object. Looked star shaped. Rose fast in the sky and then disappeared.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych llachar. Siâp seren ei olwg. Cododd yn gyflym yn yr awyr ac yna diflannodd.

Description: Looked like a bright star. Had a pulsating red and green light. Was stationary and then moved off.
Disgrifiad: Edrychodd fel seren lachar. Roedd ganddi olau coch a gwyrdd a oedd yn pwlsadu. Roedd yn sefyll yn ei hunfan ac yna symud i ffwrdd.

Description: One tennis ball sized object. Was round at the front and had a triangular back. Was rainbow coloured and very bright.
Disgrifiad: Un gwrthrych maint pêl tenis. Roedd yn grwn ar y blaen ac roedd yr ôl yn drionglog. Lliwiau'r enfys ac yn llachar iawn.

Description: One large, disc shaped object. Black in colour. It then changed to oval shape. The object was moving fast to the West.
